'''''Star Wars'' 30''' is the thirtieth issue in the ''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' series of comics. It was published on [[May 30]], [[2001]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]].

==Publisher's summary==
''Aurra Sing tracks her current target and former mentor, the Dark Woman, to a lush jungle world which is being bombarded by a seasonal meteor shower. On this beautiful yet dangerous planet, the Dark Woman seeks respite from the rigors of Jedi life and peace from her past, but her past failure has now been paid to hunt and kill her! Converging onto the same planet, Adi Gallia, Ki-Adi-Mundi, and A'Sharad Hett accompany a suspicious Quarren expedition from Mon Calamari to the surface, questioning the Quarren senator's motives and prepared to uncover the hidden reason behind his expedition! "The Hunt for Aurra Sing" continues in this exciting third chapter!''

==Plot summary==
As the story opens, [[Jedi hunter/Legends|Jedi hunter]] Aurra Sing destroys the Jedi Transport carrying [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] Ki-Adi-Mundi and Adi Gallia and [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] A'Sharad Hett. Luckily, they are able to make it to an escape pod at the last minute. Facing death hopelessly adrift in space, they are discovered by a passing Mon Calamari cruiser. The cruiser brings them aboard and the Jedi are shocked to find themselves surrounded by Quarren, including the renegade Quarren [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Tikkes/Legends|Tikkes]]. Suspicious, the Jedi decide to accompany the Senator on his trip, in order to keep a close eye on him. Meanwhile, on the [[The Dark Woman|Dark Woman]] seeks shelter from a [[meteor storm]] on her hidden refuge planet, only to be tracked down by her former apprentice, none other than Sing herself. Coincidentally, this happens to be the very planet to which the Jedi Masters and their Quarren escort are going. In an attempt to set up a perimeter, several Quarren are killed when they detonate mines left by Sing. It is at this moment that the Dark Woman choses to reveal herself. Mistakenly believing her to be their assailant, a Quarren soldier opens fire on her. Shocked, Ki-Adi-Mundi and A'Sharad Hett rush to find the Dark Woman. As soon as they find her, however, they are attacked by Aurra Sing.
